tests.name: fetchSitePlans returns a normalized array of plans
fetchSitePlans calls the correct API endpoint with siteId
fetchSitePlans passes coupon_code as a query parameter when coupon is provided
fetchSitePlans does not include coupon_code when coupon is undefined
fetchSitePlans returns an empty array when API returns an empty object
fetchSitePlans normalizes string numeric fields to numbers
fetchSitePlans normalizes cost_overrides numeric fields
fetchSitePlans preserves non-numeric cost_override fields
fetchSitePlans normalizes optional interval field when present
fetchSitePlans does not add interval when it is not present in the source
fetchSitePlans normalizes optional introductory offer fields when present
fetchSitePlans does not add introductory offer fields when not present
fetchSitePlans normalizes optional id field when present
fetchSitePlans preserves null id as null
fetchSitePlans does not add id field when it is not present
fetchSitePlans propagates API errors
fetchSitePlans handles multiple plans from different product IDs
fetchSitePlans preserves already-numeric fields as numbers
fetchSitePlans handles plans with empty cost_overrides array
fetchSitePlans handles plans with multiple cost_overrides
fetchSitePlans does not include coupon_code when coupon is empty string
sitePlansQuery returns query options with correct queryKey for siteId only
sitePlansQuery returns query options with correct queryKey including coupon
sitePlansQuery queryFn calls fetchSitePlans with siteId and coupon
sitePlansQuery queryFn calls fetchSitePlans without coupon when none provided
sitePlansQuery uses different queryKeys for different coupons on same site
siteCurrentPlanQuery returns the plan with current_plan set to true
siteCurrentPlanQuery throws when no current plan is found
siteCurrentPlanQuery throws when plans array is empty
siteCurrentPlanQuery has correct queryKey structure
siteCurrentPlanQuery returns the first matching current plan when multiple have current_plan
siteCurrentPlanQuery passes siteId to fetchSitePlans
sitePlanBySlugQuery returns the plan matching the given slug
sitePlanBySlugQuery throws when no plan with the given slug is found
sitePlanBySlugQuery throws when plans array is empty
sitePlanBySlugQuery has correct queryKey structure with slug
sitePlanBySlugQuery passes siteId to fetchSitePlans
sitePlanBySlugQuery returns the first match when multiple plans share the same slug
